description: TokenLab MCP server for model discovery, pricing, OpenAI-compatible chat, and native endpoints.
name: io.github.hedging8563/tokenlab

environmentVariables.description: Optional TokenLab API base URL. Defaults to https://api.tokenlab.sh.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Optional TokenLab API key. Required only for inference tools such as create_chat_completion, create_response, create_anthropic_message, and create_gemini_content.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

title: TokenLab
